nasb.text: In Him we have redemption through His blood, the forgiveness of our trespasses, according to the riches of His grace

esv.text: In him we have redemption through his blood, the forgiveness of our trespasses, according to the riches of his grace,

cnv.text: 我們在他愛子裡，藉著他的血蒙了救贖，過犯得到赦免，都是按著他豐盛的恩典。

ccb.text: 我们借着祂爱子的血蒙救赎，过犯得到赦免，这都是出于祂的洪恩。

csbs.text: 在他里面，我们藉着他的血，得蒙救赎、过犯得到赦免，都是出于神恩典的丰盛。
